page_metadata.biotools__summary: FAIRDataPoint is a REST api for creating, storing and servering FAIR metadata. The metadata contents are in this api are generated semi-automatically according to the FAIR Data Point software specification document. In the current version of api we support GET, POST and PATCH requests.
